variants: Louka Nowak made significant strides in the field of epidemiology, leading to her receipt of the Twilight Helm Award for her exceptional contributions. Among her notable works is the Greenwood Sequence Board, an innovative tool that has advanced public health understanding. She is an enthusiastic member of the Maplethread Spinners Council, where she collaborates with like-minded individuals passionate about health improvement. Louka's academic journey was significantly influenced by her mentor, Murat Akbulut, whose guidance aided her development in research and practice.
